mapper.sql: SELECT b.ID, b.ITEM_CODE, b.NAME, b.CATEGORY_ID, c.NAME AS CATEGORY_NAME, b.PURCHASE_PRICE, b.SELLING_PRICE, b.ITEM_CONDITION, b.STATUS, b.CUSTOMER_NAME, b.PURCHASED_AT, b.CREATED_AT, b.UPDATED_AT FROM BUYBACK_ITEM b LEFT JOIN ITEM_CATEGORY c ON b.CATEGORY_ID = c.ID
mapper.select: WHERE b.STATUS = #{status} ORDER BY b.ID DESC
WHERE b.CATEGORY_ID = #{categoryId} ORDER BY b.ID DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BUYBACK_ITEM (ITEM_CODE, NAME, CATEGORY_ID, PURCHASE_PRICE, SELLING_PRICE, ITEM_CONDITION, STATUS, CUSTOMER_NAME) VALUES (#{itemCode}, #{name}, #{categoryId}, #{purchasePrice}, #{sellingPrice}, #{condition}, #{status}, #{customerName})
mapper.update: UPDATE BUYBACK_ITEM SET NAME = #{name}, CATEGORY_ID = #{categoryId}, PURCHASE_PRICE = #{purchasePrice}, SELLING_PRICE = #{sellingPrice}, ITEM_CONDITION = #{condition}, STATUS = #{status}, CUSTOMER_NAME = #{customerName}, UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id}
UPDATE BUYBACK_ITEM SET STATUS = #{status}, UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id}
